title: Achyronia nodosa
taxonomy: Achyronia nodosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes or bean family. This classification places Achyronia nodosa in the tribe Phaseoleae within the subfamily Faboideae. The plant is further classified into the genus Achyronia, which is a small genus of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. Achyronia nodosa is a climbing or twining plant that produces showy flowers and has a unique growth habit. The classification of Achyronia nodosa reflects its evolutionary relationships with other legume species.
